Document:
# Rule 4 — Listen To Admins
Admin decisions are final. If you disagree with a decision, use ahelp to discuss it calmly and respectfully — do not argue in-game or in OOC.
- Do not ignore or dismiss ahelp messages - Do not threaten other players with ahelp or use it as a weapon in arguments - Do not discuss ongoing admin situations in OOC or LOOC
